content.en:
Dark Forbidden Domain, on a Level 3 battlefield.

A group of about sixty or seventy Forbidden Zerg was speeding through, and they were heading in a straight line in the direction of the Forbidden Hive, so it was not very difficult to discern their route.

This batch of Forbidden Zerg is basically comparable to the Sixfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and a few can be called the Fivefold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, and the few Forbidden Zerg led by them have the strength of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor.

In the Dark Forbidden Domain, if they didn't master the Forbidden Body, ordinary Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors couldn't even help a top-notch Sixfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg, which was also the sorrow of Dao Ancestors, after all, this place was not suitable for them to fight.

But they didn't dare to put the Forbidden Zerg into the Dao Mountain Realm, once they put it in, it would be difficult to expel it.

Therefore, even if this place is not suitable for Dao Ancestors to fight, they must fight here.

Those few Sevenfold Heaven Forbidden Zerg were the most threatening, and they needed the top Sevenfold Heaven Dao Ancestors to contend with them, otherwise they would not be able to resist their siege at all.

The Qinghe Dao Ancestor of the Mitian Sect happened to be not far from that batch of forbidden zergs, so he rushed over as soon as possible.

Qinghe Dao Ancestor's strength was not as strong as that of the Heavenly Claw Dao Ancestor, but he was also the top at the level of the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, far surpassing the ordinary Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, so he had the strength to delay the trip of those forbidden Zergs.

As for killing, he couldn't do it alone.

......

"Finally intercepted!"

Qinghe Dao Ancestor appeared in front of a group of forbidden zergs, his eyes were very solemn.

After all, he is under a lot of pressure, and one person needs to stop so many forbidden zergs, and he will fall if he is not careful!

But there is no way, the order from above, he must obey, if everyone is afraid of death, then the development of the Taboo Zerg cannot be restricted, and one day the Daoshan Realm will be destroyed.

Therefore, for Dao Ancestors who are afraid of death or Dao Ancestors who disobey orders, the above will definitely punish severely.

Bang!!!

Qinghe Daozu fought with this group of forbidden zergs, and was in a suppressed state from the beginning.

There is no way, the Forbidden Zerg has the Forbidden Body in its hands, and it is also a very high Forbidden Body, and it can even be described as a Ten Percent Forbidden Body, it is difficult to hurt them with ordinary attacks, and this is their home field.

It was difficult to kill a Forbidden Zerg, not to mention that Qing Dao Ancestor had to face the siege of so many Forbidden Zerg.

As time passed, Qinghe Dao Ancestor began to get injured a lot, and he only killed a few weak Five Heavens Forbidden Zerg.

After a while, another Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor came.

"It's the Shark Dao Ancestor!"

Qinghe Daozu was overjoyed.

The Crazy Shark Dao Ancestor is only a Sevenfold Heaven Force, the Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor of the Shahai Sect, but his strength is not weak, only slightly weaker than him, and now that the Crazy Shark Dao Ancestor has also come to support, his pressure is much less.

"Qinghe Dao Ancestor, I'm here to help you!"

The Wild Shark Dao Ancestor shuttled over and joined the battle, relieving Qing Dao Dao Ancestor a lot of pressure.

However, their mission is to kill these forbidden zergs, so the strength of the two of them alone is simply not enough, and they need to continue to support.

It's a pity that there are too few Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors who can come to support.

Because there are too many forbidden zergs, and there are not many Dao ancestors who really participate in the battle, many Dao ancestors need to face the threat of several or even more taboo zergs, plus some Dao ancestors still need to rest and heal.

Therefore, in this case, each Dao Ancestor has his own task or job, and it is useless for a weak Dao Ancestor to come, so there are not many Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors who really come to support.

After all, the top Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors from other places had been mobilized one by one, so what should be done about the battles in other places?

If this happened in the Divine Heaven Realm, then there was no need to worry at all, the Divine Heaven Realm could easily sweep away the Forbidden Zerg by sending a few domain ancestors.

But this is the realm of Daoshan, and the strength is insufficient, so this is a very helpless thing.

In addition, it is impossible for the major forces to devote all their strength, otherwise they will not be able to bear such losses if they suffer heavy losses.

Therefore, after waiting for the Qinghe Dao Ancestor and the Wild Shark Dao Ancestor to fight for a long time, the third Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor arrived.

This is a female Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestor, a silver-clothed Dao Ancestor from the Hundred Flowers Palace of the Eightfold Heavenly Forces, whose strength is similar to that of Qinghe Dao Ancestor, but the silver-clothed Dao Ancestor came with an injury, because not long ago, she was fighting with another forbidden Zerg, and although she killed the other party, she was slightly injured.

But even so, she was still able to exert more than ninety percent of her combat effectiveness.

The Three Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors fought against this batch of taboo zergs and gained a decisive advantage, and a weaker taboo zerg was killed one by one.

According to this trend, the final result is probably that the Forbidden Zerg will be completely wiped out, and the three of them will be seriously injured.

The wish is beautiful, but the reality is cruel.

"Oh no!"

Qinghe Daozu's expression changed drastically.

"What's wrong?"

The silver-clothed Dao Ancestor and the Wild Shark Dao Ancestor asked.

"You sense that over there, another group of Forbidden Zerg is coming, and it seems to be to support this batch of Forbidden Zerg!" Qinghe Dao Ancestor said solemnly.

The silver-clothed Dao Ancestor and the Wild Shark Dao Ancestor sensed the void of the Dark Forbidden Domain in the distance, and sure enough, they sensed the surge of dark forbidden power over there, and it was obvious that there were many creatures shuttling over, and in this area, the creatures that could create this kind of movement could not be the Dao Ancestors of the Dao Mountain Realm, they must be the Forbidden Zerg.

"I don't know how many forbidden zergs there are, if there are many of them......"

Qinghe Daozu and the three were very worried.

No, all three of them will fall here.

Soon, the forbidden zerg appeared.

"Sixty-three forbidden zergs!"

The expressions of the three Qinghe Dao Ancestors changed drastically, and more importantly, there were six seven-headed Heavenly Dao Ancestors among the sixty-three forbidden zergs, which was definitely a catastrophe for the three of them.

"Prepare to escape!"

Qinghe Daozu shouted.

In the face of this irresistible danger, it is useless to fight hard, but will give the corpses of the three Sevenfold Heavenly Dao Ancestors of the Forbidden Zerg again.

Therefore, in such a situation, even if they fled, those invincible Dao Ancestors would not punish them.

However, these taboo zergs don't seem to want to let them go.

As soon as they fled, the Forbidden Zerg began to chase and kill, making their speed very slow, and they were soon caught up by the second batch of Forbidden Zerg.

The two batches of forbidden zergs converged, and the threat instantly increased by several notches.

They can't stop it!

At this moment, a figure shuttled at an extremely fast speed, and soon appeared in their divine sense.

"It's the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor, but it's useless for him to come!"

Qinghe Daozu said in despair.

At this time, the silver-clothed Dao Ancestor said happily: "No, the strength of the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor is very strong, the strongest Dao Ancestor of our sect said that the most terrifying of the Seven Heavenly Dao Ancestors should now belong to the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors and the Nine Extremes Heavenly King!

As soon as the silver-clothed Dao Ancestor said this, a glimmer of hope arose in the hearts of the Qing Dao Dao Ancestor and the Crazy Shark Dao Ancestor.
